---
title: "Option 1: The North Wales Action Weekend"
---

## Basecamp

- **Location:** Llandudno, North Wales
- **Dates:** 25th - 27th Sept 2026

## The Itinerary

### Zip World Caverns

A mind-blowing underground zip-line and adventure course in Blaenau Ffestiniog.

- Official page: [Zip World Caverns](https://www.zipworld.co.uk/adventures/caverns)

[![Zip World Caverns](https://transforms.zipworld.co.uk/production/images/Adventures/Caverns/Caverns-9.jpg?w=1024&h=576&q=40&auto=format&fit=crop&dm=1757342573&s=36b736642e987eb723ed4ee517daa013)](https://www.zipworld.co.uk/adventures/caverns)

<div class="video-embed">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/_bKqTKIe3JI" title="Caverns 2024 - Zip World Llechwedd" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

---

### Zip World Quarry Karts

The UK's only mountain kart dirt track in Bethesda.

- Official page: [Zip World Quarry Karts](https://www.zipworld.co.uk/adventures/quarry-karts)

[![Zip World Quarry Karts](https://transforms.zipworld.co.uk/production/images/Adventures/Quarry-Karts/5X7A9960-2.jpg?w=1024&h=576&q=40&auto=format&fit=crop&crop=focalpoint&fp-x=0.6987&fp-y=0.5521&dm=1757343002&s=bc532c56f462380315e0606871fe3916)](https://www.zipworld.co.uk/adventures/quarry-karts)

<div class="video-embed">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/CPnSawwUx6s" title="Quarry Karts 2024 - Zip World Penrhyn Quarry" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

---

### Penderyn Distillery Tour

Welsh whisky tasting right in town (Llandudno).

- Official page: [Penderyn Llandudno Tour](https://www.penderyn.wales/tours-llandudno/)

[![Penderyn Llandudno Distillery](https://www.penderyn.wales/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Llandudno-Tour-banner-Final.jpg)](https://www.penderyn.wales/tours-llandudno/)

---

### Accommodation: Travelodge Llandudno (2 nights)

- Official page: [Travelodge Llandudno](https://www.travelodge.co.uk/hotels/562/Llandudno-hotel)
- [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vKK32qv5zpo)

<div class="video-embed">
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vKK32qv5zpo?rel=0" title="Travelodge Llandudno | Llandudno, United Kingdom | Hotel Review" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

## Cost Breakdown

### Activity and stay costs (group of 9)

| Item | Group cost | Per person (9 pay) | Per person (8 pay, stag free) |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Travelodge (4 twins + 1 king) | £699.90 | £77.77 | £87.49 |
| Penderyn Distillery Tour | £117.00 | £13.00 | £14.63 |
| Zip World Caverns (standard) | £729.00 | £81.00 | £91.13 |
| Zip World Caverns (early bird) | £619.65 | £68.85 | £77.46 |
| Quarry Karts (standard) | £441.00 | £49.00 | £55.13 |
| Quarry Karts (early bird) | £374.85 | £41.65 | £46.86 |
| **Total (standard rates)** | **£1,986.90** | **£220.77** | **£248.36** |
| **Total (early bird rates)** | **£1,811.40** | **£201.27** | **£226.43** |

> Early bird discount requires booking 30+ days in advance. Savings on individual tickets only.
